data.name: ContainerMountAnonymousVolumesReadOnlyExceptionMessage
data.value: Anonymous volumes cannot be read-only.

data.name: ContainerMountBindMountsRequireRootedPaths
data.value: Bind mounts must specify an absolute path.

data.name: ContainerMountBindMountsRequireSourceExceptionMessage
data.value: Bind mounts must specify a source path.

data.name: DcpDependencyCheckFailedMessage
data.value: Application orchestrator dependency check returned an error: {0}

data.name: DcpVersionCheckTooLowMessage
data.value: Newer version of the Aspire.Hosting.AppHost package is required to run the application. Ensure you are referencing at least version '{0}'.

data.name: InstallationInstructions
data.value: Installation instructions

data.name: MissingCommandNotificationTitle
data.value: Missing command

data.name: RequiredCommandNotFound
data.value: Required command '{0}' was not found on PATH or at the specified location.

data.name: RequiredCommandNotFoundWithLink
data.value: Required command '{0}' was not found on PATH or at the specified location. For installation instructions, see: {1}

data.name: RequiredCommandValidationFailed
data.value: Command '{0}' validation failed: {1}

data.name: RequiredCommandValidationFailedWithLink
data.value: Command '{0}' validation failed: {1}. For installation instructions, see: {2}

data.name: PersistentContainerWithoutUserSecrets
data.value: Resource '{0}' has a persistent lifetime but the AppHost project does not have user secrets configured. Generated parameter values (such as passwords) may change on each restart, causing persistent containers to be recreated. Run 'aspire secret set' to initialize user secrets.

data.name: ResourceMayFailToStart
data.value: Resource '{0}' may fail to start: {1}

data.name: BrowserLogsDefaultProfileName
data.value: (default)

data.name: BrowserLogsEmptyBrowserConfiguration
data.value: Tracked browser configuration resolved an empty browser value.

data.name: BrowserLogsEmptyProfileConfiguration
data.value: Tracked browser configuration resolved an empty profile value.

data.name: BrowserLogsProfileRequiresSharedUserDataMode
data.value: Tracked browser configuration set '{0}' to '{1}' while '{2}' is '{3}'. Profiles can only be selected when '{2}' is '{4}'.
data.comment: {0} is the profile configuration key, {1} is the configured profile, {2} is the user data mode configuration key, {3} is Isolated, {4} is Shared.

data.name: BrowserLogsInvalidUserDataModeConfiguration
data.value: Tracked browser configuration value '{0}' is not a valid '{1}'. Expected '{2}' or '{3}'.
data.comment: {0} is the configured value, {1} is the user data mode configuration key, {2} and {3} are valid enum values.

data.name: BrowserLogsUnableToLocateBrowser
data.value: Unable to locate browser '{0}'. Specify an installed Chromium-based browser or an explicit executable path.
data.comment: {0} is the requested browser name or path.

data.name: BrowserLogsAppHostPathShaNotAvailable
data.value: Cannot resolve the isolated browser user data directory because the AppHost path identifier is not available. Use '{0}' user data mode or run from a configured AppHost.
data.comment: {0} is the Isolated user data mode value.

data.name: BrowserLogsUserDataDirectoryNotFound
data.value: Browser user data directory '{0}' was not found.

data.name: BrowserLogsTrackedBrowserProfileConflict
data.value: A tracked browser is already running for user data directory '{0}' with profile '{1}'. The requested profile is '{2}'. Close the existing tracked browser session or use isolated user data mode.
data.comment: {0} is the user data directory, {1} is the existing profile, {2} is the requested profile.

data.name: BrowserLogsUnableToReadProfileMetadata
data.value: Unable to read Chromium profile metadata from '{0}' while resolving browser profile '{1}'.
data.comment: {0} is the Local State file path, {1} is the requested profile.

data.name: BrowserLogsInvalidProfileMetadata
data.value: Chromium profile metadata in '{0}' is invalid while resolving browser profile '{1}'.
data.comment: {0} is the Local State file path, {1} is the requested profile.

data.name: BrowserLogsProfileNotFound
data.value: Browser profile '{0}' was not found under '{1}'. Specify the profile directory name (for example 'Default' or 'Profile 1') or a browser profile name from Chromium's profile metadata.
data.comment: {0} is the requested profile, {1} is the user data directory.

data.name: BrowserLogsAmbiguousProfile
data.value: Browser profile '{0}' matched multiple Chromium profiles under '{1}'. Specify the profile directory name instead.
data.comment: {0} is the requested profile, {1} is the user data directory.

data.name: BrowserLogsResourceMissingHttpEndpoint
data.value: Resource '{0}' does not have an HTTP or HTTPS endpoint. Browser logs require an endpoint to navigate to.

data.name: BrowserLogsEndpointNotAllocated
data.value: Endpoint '{0}' for resource '{1}' has not been allocated yet.
data.comment: {0} is the endpoint name, {1} is the resource name.

data.name: BrowserLogsProcessExitedBeforeProcessId
data.value: Tracked browser process exited with code {0} before reporting its process id.
data.comment: {0} is the browser process exit code.

data.name: BrowserLogsProcessExitedBeforeDebugEndpoint
data.value: Tracked browser process exited with code {0} before the debug endpoint metadata was written to '{1}'.
data.comment: {0} is the browser process exit code, {1} is the DevToolsActivePort file path.
